cobblemon.species.coldeon.name: Coldeon
cobblemon.species.coldeon.desc: Every attacking move that hits the opponent has a 10% chance to freeze.
cobblemon.species.devileon.name: Devileon
cobblemon.species.devileon.desc: A sinister Eeveelution that wields flames capable of burning through spirits.
cobblemon.species.gloweon.name: Gloweon
cobblemon.species.gloweon.desc: Its body glows with a mystical light that reacts to the rain.
cobblemon.species.laterneon.name: Lanterneon
cobblemon.species.laterneon.desc: An Eeveelution that thrives in the deepest depths of the ocean.
cobblemon.species.lyopheon.name: Lyopheon
cobblemon.species.lyopheon.desc: Its presence brings a freezing chill that can summon sudden snowstorms.
cobblemon.species.nateon.name: Nateon
cobblemon.species.nateon.desc: A guardian of the forest that draws strength from the grassy earth.
cobblemon.species.obleon.name: Obleon
cobblemon.species.obleon.desc: An Eeveelution born from the balance of shadows and moonlight.
cobblemon.species.oracleon.name: Oracleon
cobblemon.species.oracleon.desc: Its flames reveal glimpses of the future to those who dare to look.
cobblemon.species.soleon.name: Soleon
cobblemon.species.soleon.desc: It draws energy from the sun to power its intense electrical discharges.
cobblemon.species.steameon.name: Steameon
cobblemon.species.steameon.desc: It controls the power of boiling steam, making it immune to typical fire weaknesses.
